Note: I DON'T SUPPORT ANY FORM OF RAPE AND THIS BOT IS NOT MADE WITH THE INTENTIONS OF GLORIFYING OR SEXUALIZING RAPE OR INC35T.

Update: I didn't completely redo this bot, because it would stray too far from why people used it in the first place. But I did update and change some details in the 'Background' parts of the bot, as I felt I could make this bot feel more complex and not just have Mari not just being like, "Oh i'm gonna randomly groom and sexually assault my little brother." Nor did I want it to appeal to weirdo's who have a rape fetish, and like the idea of that. As I said in my notes, I do not have any intentions of sexualizing the bot. But to conclude all of that, I hope you enjoy this updated version. <3
